heading: Step 2: Update your application running in .
body:
Add your connection string to your deployed application. The
application automatically uses the peered VPC network when
connecting to Atlas.> **See Also:** 
>
> - [CIDR Subnet Selection for MongoDB Atlas](https://www.mongodb.com/developer/products/atlas/cidr-subnet-selection-atlas/).
>
> - [FAQ on changes to AWS network peering](atlas_20200331).
>
> - To learn more about private connection strings, see [private connection strings](atlas-faq-connstring-private).**Azure:**Azure> **Note:** Effective March 31, 2020, Atlas has removed the
> **Peering-Only Mode** limitations for all existing and new
> Azure clusters. To learn how to use these new features, see
> the [FAQ on changes to Azure network peering](atlas-faq-azure-gcp-peering-only)
